experiment_title: 卤素与卤化物离子的反应及金属性比较实验

data.xdl_enriched:
<XDL>
  <Metadata title="卤素与卤化物离子的反应及金属性比较实验" goal="比较Cl2、Br2、I2对卤化物离子的氧化性及其反应现象，探究Na、Mg、Al的金属性强弱及其与水、酸、碱的反应特性。" difficulty="Normal" />
  <Synthesis>
    <Hardware>
      <Component id="drop_plate" type="spot_plate" capacity="6_wells" />
      <Component id="dropper_1" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_2" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_3" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_4" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_5" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="dropper_6" type="dropper" />
      <Component id="beaker_1" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_2" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_3" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_4" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_5" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
      <Component id="beaker_6" type="beaker" capacity="50ml" />
    </Hardware>
    <Reagents>
      <Reagent name="NaBr_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="NaI_solution" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="distilled_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="chlorine_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="bromine_water" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="Mg_OH2" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="Al_OH3" state="solid" />
      <Reagent name="dilute_HCl" state="liquid" />
      <Reagent name="dilute_NaOH" state="liquid" />
    </Reagents>
    <Procedure>
      
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="NaBr" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_1" id="step_0" />
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="NaI" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_2" id="step_1" />
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="H2O" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_3" id="step_2" />
      
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="Cl2" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_4" id="step_3" />
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="Cl2" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_4" id="step_4" />
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="Cl2" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_4" id="step_5" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_6" />
      
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="NaI" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_2" id="step_7" />
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="H2O" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_3" id="step_8" />
      
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="Br2" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_5" id="step_9" />
      <Add vessel="drop_plate" reagent="Br2" volume="3 drops" tool="dropper_5" id="step_10" />
      
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_11" />
      
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="Mg(OH)2" mass="0.2 g" tool="dropper_6" id="step_12" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_1" reagent="HCl" volume="5 mL" tool="dropper_1" id="step_13" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_14" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_2" reagent="Al(OH)3" mass="0.2 g" tool="dropper_6" id="step_15" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_2" reagent="HCl" volume="5 mL" tool="dropper_2" id="step_16" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_17" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_3" reagent="Mg(OH)2" mass="0.2 g" tool="dropper_6" id="step_18" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_3" reagent="NaOH" volume="5 mL" tool="dropper_3" id="step_19" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_20" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_4" reagent="Al(OH)3" mass="0.2 g" tool="dropper_6" id="step_21" />
      <Add vessel="beaker_4" reagent="NaOH" volume="5 mL" tool="dropper_4" id="step_22" />
      <Wait time="30s" id="step_23" />
    </Procedure>
  </Synthesis>
</XDL>

graph_nodes.description: 在点板上分别滴加溴化钠、碘化钠和蒸馏水，为卤素与卤化物离子的反应做准备。
向上述各孔分别滴加氯水，观察与不同卤化物离子的反应现象。
等待反应进行，便于观察现象。
继续在点板上滴加碘化钠和蒸馏水，然后分别滴加溴水，比较溴水与不同卤化物离子的反应。
等待反应进行，便于观察溴水与卤化物离子的反应现象。
向烧杯中加入氢氧化镁和稀盐酸，观察其反应现象，探究镁的化学性质。
向另一烧杯中加入氢氧化铝和稀盐酸，观察其反应现象，探究铝的化学性质。
向烧杯中加入氢氧化镁和稀氢氧化钠溶液，观察其反应现象，进一步探究镁的化学性质。
向另一烧杯中加入氢氧化铝和稀氢氧化钠溶液，观察其反应现象，进一步探究铝的化学性质。
